home.title: Inteleri — Zero‑Trust Logistics Intelligence
home.description: Security‑native platform that unifies apps, agents, and predictive analytics—one place to secure, analyze, and run logistics operations.

platform.title: Inteleri Platform — Security-native, governed operations
platform.description: Workspace-centric platform where security runs first and fails closed. Tenant-scoped execution, policy-aware access, operational intelligence, and auditability for governed automation.

tsm.title: Inteleri TSM — Tokenized, Auditable Capability Delivery
tsm.description: Pay only for value with capability‑based execution and full auditability.

agents.title: Inteleri AI Control — Governed automation, bounded execution
agents.description: Governed AI-enabled workflows and bounded automation inside security-native controls: policy-aware execution, tenant scoping, fail-closed safeguards, and auditability.

apps.title: Inteleri Apps — Composable Suite for Modern Logistics
apps.description: Activate only what you need: Analytics, Loadboard, Emissions, Intelligence, and more.

demos.title: Inteleri Demos — Guided Workflows on Realistic Data
demos.description: Try end‑to‑end flows: load execution, emissions reporting, and risk assessment.

about.title: About Inteleri — Mission, Values, Contact
